3325990.name: Lost & Found Collection: Free Pack
3325990.description:
This DLC contains 3 VHS Tapes that are added to the base game, here is the list of the tapes:

"Report 07" Developed by LeafDev

  • Story: Investigate why the research station in the snowy region of [REDACTED] suddenly went radio silent.

"First Awake" Developed by Monkey029

  • Story: You are having a sleepover with your friends! Except you somehow woke up in the middle of the night and can't go back to sleep. What will you do to try and get back to bed?

"Blood Ties" Developed by Combo Bomb Games

  • Story: It’s your birthday party, and everyone should be celebrating! But when you wake up, something feels off… Your dad isn’t home, and things aren’t as they should be. Will this birthday party go as planned, or will something strange unfold?
    Gameplay: WASD to move F to toggle flashlight E to interact with objects Shift to sprint ESC / P to pause
3325990.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
